name: AWS IAM Multiple Failed MFA Requests For A User
description: This model detects multiple failed Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) requests for a user, indicating potential security risks or authentication challenges. This can lead to unauthorized access attempts or compromised user credentials, impacting the security of AWS resources and user accounts.

rules.name: AWS IAM Multiple Failed MFA Requests For A User

author: Srivathsa H S and Sunil Bharti
